scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
